provenance: Analytically derived for packet 111 Step 6 — no OrcaSlicer ground-truth fixture exists for any BeadingStrategy class in OrcaSlicerDocumented (confirmed via sub-agent read of LimitedBeadingStrategy.cpp during this step). Parent (DistributedBeadingStrategy) output computed by hand from its documented Gaussian-redistribution formula, using optimal_width=4000 and a thickness chosen so to_be_divided == 0 (no surplus/deficit), which collapses the general-case formula to bead_widths == optimal_width for every bead — avoids depending on the Gaussian-weight arithmetic for this fixture. Sentinel placement: left block inserted at index max_bead_count/2=3 of the parent's max_bead_count-sized beading with location = innermost left bead's INNER EDGE (centerline 10000 + half-width 2000 = 12000); right block inserted at the mirrored index (6) with location = innermost right bead's INNER EDGE (centerline 14000 - half-width 2000 = 12000). This matches OrcaSlicer LimitedBeadingStrategy.cpp:118-122,126-130 (sentinel at innermost_toolpath_location + innermost_toolpath_width/2 and the mirrored - innermost_toolpath_width/2). max_bead_count=6 and bead_count=9 chosen to clearly exercise bead_count > max_bead_count (sentinel_count = 9 - 6 = 3); bead_count=4 case exercises the under-cap pass-through (sentinel_count = 0). Re-derived 2026-07-13 to reflect the OrcaSlicer-faithful inner-edge sentinel placement (D-105C), correcting the previous centerline placement that did not match the canonical source.

cases.note: over-cap: requested bead_count=9 > max_bead_count=6; parent computed at the capped count (6) over thickness=24000 (== 6*optimal_width, no surplus) produces six uniform 4000-wide beads; sentinel_count=3 zero-width sentinels inserted as two symmetric blocks (left block at index 3, right block at mirrored+shifted index 6) at the cap boundary.

under-cap pass-through: requested bead_count=4 <= max_bead_count=6; compute delegates directly to parent.compute(16000, 4) unchanged, no sentinels inserted (sentinel_count=0). thickness=16000 == 4*optimal_width, no surplus, so all four beads are exactly 4000 wide.
